title: The Ledger on Fifth Street
teacher_goal: Students practice historical inquiry by distinguishing verified evidence, source-based inference, and fictional gameplay framing.
fictional_elements: A missing ledger creates the classroom mystery.
Students interview fictionalized witnesses created for gameplay.
student_hook: A rumor moves through town: a ledger has gone missing, and the clues may point students toward the difference between what history proves, what it suggests, and what a story invents.
teacher_notes: This is a placeholder mission seed for validation only. Replace placeholder claims and sources with verified Texarkana 1885 evidence before classroom use.
